lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Bob was driving down the highway, enjoying the feel of the wind rushing through his open window. He had just finished a long day at work and was eager to get home. What was Bob enjoying?

translations.Somali: Bob wuxuu ku socday wadada weyn, isagoo ku raaxeysanaya dareenka dabaysha ku dheceysa daaqadda furan. Wuxuu dhammeeyey maalin dheer oo shaqo ah wuuna doonayey inuu guriga u noqdo. Maxaa Bob ku raaxeysanayey?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Yeah - the feel of the wind. The sun was setting, casting a golden glow over the landscape, and Bob felt a sense of calm wash over him. And what was Bob doing? Was he walking?

translations.Somali: Qoraxdu way dhaceysay, iyadoo iftiin dahabi ah ku faafinaysa dhulka, Bobna wuxuu dareemay deganaan ku baahday. Maxaa Bob sameynayey? Ma socday?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: No. He wasn't walking. He was driving. Suddenly, his tranquility was interrupted by the flash of red and blue lights in his rearview mirror. He glanced at his speedometer and realized he had been going over the speed limit. What interrupted his feel of the wind?

translations.Somali: Maya. Ma socon, wuxuu waday gaari. Si lama filaan ah, xasilloonidiisii waxaa carqaladeeyey iftiinka casaan iyo buluug ee ku muuqday muraayadda dambe. Wuxuu eegay xawaareheegiisa wuxuuna ogaaday inuu ka dheereeyey xadka xawaaraha. Maxaa carqaladeeyey dareenkiisii dabaysha?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: His calmness was interrupted by the flash of red and blue lights. It was interrupted by the police. There was a police car in his rearview mirror. As he pulled over to the side of the road, Bob's heart began to race. A police officer approached his car, and Bob rolled down his window. Who approached Bob's car?

translations.Somali: Degaankiisii waxaa carqaladeeyey iftiinka casaan iyo buluug. Waxaa carqaladeeyey booliiska. Waxaa jiray gaari booliis oo ka muuqday muraayadda dambe. Markii uu gaariga dhinaca wadada la galay, wadnaha Bob ayaa bilaabay inuu si xawli ah u garaaco. Sarkaal booliis ah ayaa u soo dhawaaday gaarigiisa, Bobna wuxuu daaqadda hoos u rogay. Yaa u soo dhawaaday gaariga Bob?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: A police officer. The officer explained that Bob had been speeding and asked for his license and registration. Was Bob feeling differently now? Was he still enjoying the feel of the wind?

translations.Somali: Sarkaal booliis ah. Sarkaalka ayaa u sharaxay Bob inuu xawaaraha ku dheereeyey wuxuuna weydiistay shatiga iyo diiwaangelinta. Bob ma dareemayey si ka duwan hadda? Weli ma ku raaxeysanayey dareenka dabaysha?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Well, not really. He was not feeling frustrated. Bob handed them over, feeling a mix of frustration and resignation. He knew he had been in the wrong but hoped the situation could be resolved quickly.

translations.Somali: Dhab ahaantii maya. Ma dareemayn raaxo. Bob wuu dhiibay shatigii iyo diiwaangelintii, isagoo dareemaya isku dhafka niyadjabka iyo isdhiibidda. Wuxuu ogaa inuu khaldamay balse wuxuu rajeynayey in xaaladda si dhaqso ah loo xallin karo.
